name: What benefits can I get for permanent lung damage from work exposure in Sandy?
description: Medical, 2/3 wages, permanent disability for lung damage.[6]

mainEntity.name: What benefits can I get for permanent lung damage from work exposure in Sandy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical, 2/3 wages, permanent disability for lung damage.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah workers’ comp pays medical bills, lost wages (2/3), permanent partial disability, prosthetics if needed.[6] Covers occupational diseases like lung issues.[1][6] Key factors: (1) Time lost from work; (2) Permanent function loss; (3) Burial/dependent if fatal.[6] File claim, attend exams; maximize medical records for rating.[6] Benefits replace wages during recovery.
